permissions.label: View chats
permissions.description: Open inbox rows and conversation detail surfaces.

permissions.label: View pending chats
permissions.description: See pending and unclaimed chat rows.

permissions.label: Reply to pending chats
permissions.description: Send replies before a pending chat is claimed.

permissions.label: View messages
permissions.description: Read message history inside chat detail.

permissions.label: Send messages
permissions.description: Send new messages in chats the user can operate.

permissions.label: View contacts
permissions.description: Read contact records and contact-linked chat surfaces.

permissions.label: Export contacts
permissions.description: Export contact data inside the visible scope.

permissions.label: All contacts scope
permissions.description: Role default allows all organization contacts.

permissions.label: Instance-only scope
permissions.description: Role default restricts visibility to allowed instances.

permissions.label: Allowed numbers scope
permissions.description: Role default restricts visibility to an explicit phone whitelist.

permissions.label: Manage settings
permissions.description: Open and manage organization settings surfaces.

permissions.label: Manage roles
permissions.description: Create, edit, and delete custom roles.

permissions.label: View users
permissions.description: Read user lists and user context details.

permissions.label: Update users
permissions.description: Update user availability and permission overrides.
